events.text: Dominik Livakovic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Mateo Kovacic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Argentina 1, Croatia 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal!  Argentina 2, Croatia 0. Julián Álvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner    following a fast break.
Cristian Romero (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 3, Croatia 0. Julián Álvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Lionel Messi.
Nicolás Otamendi (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
